---
title: "Aunt Charlotte’s Stories of Bible History for the Little Ones. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Stories of English History,” &c."
---

## Aunt Charlotte’s Stories of Bible History for the Little Ones. By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Stories of English History,” &c.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1875
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Marcus Ward & Co., Chandos St, W.C. London; and Royal Ulster Works, Belfast.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
